title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Zappfresh

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Zappfresh
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zappfresh! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zappfresh:
Zappfresh is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zappfresh!
